concept.title: Warranty Overview (Australia)
concept.shortdesc: High-level summary of warranty coverage principles applicable to BYD vehicles sold in Australia.

section.title: Purpose of this Documentation
section.p: This knowledge base restructures warranty information into modular, searchable topics to support sales conversations, customer onboarding, and internal service coordination.

section.title: Scope
section.p: Applies to BYD EV and DM series vehicles officially supplied to the Australian market. Coverage details may vary by model and model year.

ul.li: Report defects promptly through authorized channels.

section.title: Why Structured Content Matters
section.p: Modular documentation ensures consistency across vehicle models and reduces ambiguity during pre-sales and post-sales communication.
